headline: The New England Journal of Medicine Publishes First Data to Demonstrate the Potential for Disease Modification in Dravet Syndrome
summary: –Results show that targeting the underlying cause of Dravet syndrome with zorevunersen may improve outcomes for people with this rare, devastating genetic neurodevelopmental disease– –Data support ongoing global Phase 3 EMPEROR study– BEDFORD, Mass. and CAMBRIDGE, Mass., March 04, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Stoke Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: STOK), a biotechnology company dedicated to restoring protein expression by harnessing the body’s potential with RNA medicine, and Biogen Inc. (NASDAQ: BIIB),
